race.comment: Betting says this is a two-horse war. OAKFIELD MISSOURI (1) showed good gate speed to travel in the leading pair then went right on with the job on debut last start over 1000m at this track. Strong through the line that day so an extra 200m holds no fears. Great chance to make it two from two. STARVERNA (5) gets back in her races but has finished with great purpose to record a win and two seconds from three runs to date. Picked up impressively in heavy going at Dubbo last time but found one a little better over the 1100m course. Sure to be prominent once more. TWICE AZ COOL (4) won his maiden two back at Warren then put in a bad one at Muswellbrook last start. Draws a better gate and the senior rider takes over so worth another chance. DEVILISH SUN (2) is a consistent gelding who finds the line well. This small field will suit his racing pattern. SOULS COMPANION (3) caught the eye first-up at Dubbo and is better placed over this slightly longer trip.
